title: 1. Default Subtitles
script: [Visual: modern office] This video uses the standard subtitle style (Fade, Bottom, White).

title: 2. Subtitles Disabled
script: [Visual: forest] In this video, subtitles are completely disabled via the showText: false flag.

title: 3. Styled: Top Slide
script: [Visual: city skyline] These subtitles appear at the Top and use the Slide Up animation.

title: 4. Styled: Center Zoom
script: [Visual: ocean] These subtitles are Centered and use the Zoom In animation with a Yellow color.

title: 5. Styled: Typewriter
script: [Visual: library] This uses the Typewriter effect with small, red text at the bottom.

title: 6. Per-Scene Logic
script:
[Visual: sunrise] [Text: off] (This line has NO subtitles because of the off tag).
[Visual: mountains] [Text: on] (This line HAS subtitles, even if global was off).
[Visual: tech] This line follows the global setting.

title: 7. Global Style + Per-Scene Control
script:
[Visual: abstract] [Text: off] Starting without text...
[Visual: fire] [Text: on] Now showing Large White Top-Aligned Text!
[Visual: ice] Ending with the Same Global Style.
